summary: Phase 6 External Integrations testing completed. All 21 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: Integrations page with 4 tabs (Webhooks, Google Calendar, WhatsApp, Widget Tracking), WhatsApp button on Lead Detail page, sidebar Intégrations nav item.
seed_data_creation: Created test user, session, and lead with phone number for WhatsApp testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 (External Integrations) fully tested. Webhooks CRUD with event validation, iCal export with text/calendar format, WhatsApp click-to-chat with templates, tracking widget JS generator (public endpoint). Lead creation fires webhooks. All 4 tabs on Integrations page work correctly.

phase_6_backend: GET /api/webhooks/events - lists 12 valid webhook event types
POST /api/webhooks - creates webhook with name, url, events
GET /api/whatsapp/templates - returns 5 templates (welcome, quote_ready, reminder, invoice, followup)
POST /api/whatsapp/send with template - works with template resolution
GET /api/widget/script - returns JavaScript (PUBLIC, no auth required)
GET /api/widget/snippet - returns HTML installation snippet (auth required)
POST /api/leads - creates lead and fires webhooks (public)
Auth requirement checks for all protected endpoints
phase_6_frontend: Login page loads with Google OAuth
4 tabs visible: Webhooks, Google Calendar, WhatsApp, Widget Tracking
Calendar tab: iCal URL input (data-testid='ical-url'), copy button, download link
WhatsApp tab: 5 templates displayed (welcome, quote_ready, reminder, invoice, followup)
Tracking tab: installation snippet with copy button
All existing pages (Kanban, Planning, Finance, Analytics, Quotes, Invoices) still work

mocked_apis.whatsapp: Uses click-to-chat links (wa.me/{phone}?text={message}) - no actual WhatsApp Business API integration
mocked_apis.webhook_delivery: Webhook delivery to external URLs may fail (async, doesn't break app)
